hero.name: Phuong Bui Thanh
hero.lede: Eight years building enterprise web platforms with **React/Next.js** and **Angular**. I design frontend architecture, keep it fast, and lead the team that ships it.

platformMap.title: VELA · the frontend I architected
platformMap.note: Each portal gets the stack and architecture its delivery needs — a React/Next.js Core app owned end-to-end by one team; Customer and Supplier ship as independent Angular Micro Frontend platforms so teams deploy in parallel.

rows.name: VELA Logistics Platform
rows.problem: A multi-tenant logistics platform for internal and external users — three portals, one 60-person program, teams that needed to ship in parallel without stepping on each other.
rows.decision: Three repositories, all multi-tenant: a **React/Next.js Core Portal** as a single application, and **separate Angular Nx Monorepo Micro Frontend platforms** (host + remotes) for the Customer and Supplier portals. Jasmine + SonarQube quality gates in a Docker/Kubernetes CI/CD pipeline.
rows.outcome: Independent deployments and parallel team development; Core Portal initial bundle cut from **12 MB to 3 MB** (webpack-bundle-analyzer); led the team of 8 that built and shipped it.
rows.role: Architecture, engineering standards, code review workflow, GitFlow strategy — while staying hands-on across React/Next.js and Angular, including the Core Portal performance work.
rows.arch:
**vela frontend** · 3 repos · all multi-tenant
├── core-portal        **React/Next.js · single app**   — internal operations
├── customer-portal    **Angular · Nx monorepo · MFE**  — host + remotes
└── supplier-portal    **Angular · Nx monorepo · MFE**  — host + remotes
rows.tech: React · Next.js · Angular · TypeScript · Redux Toolkit · TanStack Query · RxJS · Nx · Module Federation · Docker · Kubernetes · Jasmine · SonarQube

rows.name: SOGUS — Examination Platform
rows.problem: Candidate screening with multiple assessment formats — and two very different audiences: internal administrators and candidates taking tests.
rows.decision: Two separate applications: **Angular** for the internal administration portal, **React/Next.js** for the candidate-facing landing, interview and testing flows.
rows.outcome: A unified exam lifecycle across both apps, delivered by a 10-person project team with the frontend workstream led by me.
rows.role: Frontend architecture across both stacks, task planning, PR review, stakeholder communication.
rows.tech: Angular · React · Next.js · TypeScript · Java · PostgreSQL

rows.name: Medbuy — Pharmaceutical E-commerce
rows.problem: E-commerce connecting pharmaceutical suppliers, agents and end users — responsive UX with reliable backend integration.
rows.decision: React/Next.js frontend built in close collaboration with UX/UI designers; REST API contracts agreed with the NestJS backend team.
rows.outcome: Design-accurate, responsive interfaces shipped to production with containerized deployment.
rows.role: Frontend implementation and API integration on a 10-person project team.

rows.name: Kensa Order System
rows.problem: Order and revenue management with Admin and Customer portals, including live payment.
rows.decision: End-to-end build in a two-person team: React frontend, Laravel REST APIs, VNPay and Payoo payment integration, Docker deployment on Linux.
rows.outcome: Order processing, reporting and live payment flows running in production.
rows.role: Everything frontend-to-backend — the project that taught me what full ownership costs.

items.org: AMIT Group Joint Stock Company — Ho Chi Minh City
